reviews.comment:
Es la segunda vez k vengo a este hotel, cada vez peor, ahora el año pasado no le andaba  el agua caliente, este año no tenian aire acondicionado, un espanto, lastima k sea asi...

(Translated by Google)
This is the second time I've come to this hotel, and it gets worse each time. Last year the hot water didn't work, and this year they didn't have air conditioning. It's awful, it's a shame it's like this...

reviews.comment:
Bien los baños de la estación de servicio. Demoras para cargar combustible. El Full nunca tiene comida como en otros. El restaurante, demoras y no la mejor atención.

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms at the gas station are fine. There are delays getting fuel. The Full station never has food like other stations. The restaurant has delays and the service isn't the best.

reviews.comment:
Dormimos en el.motel..todo limpio. La comida en el restaurante muy buena y accesible. Salvo por un par de empleadas que les falta entender lo que servicio al cliente significa, el resto muy bien y amables

(Translated by Google)
We slept at the motel; everything was clean. The food in the restaurant was very good and affordable. Except for a couple of employees who didn't quite grasp the concept of customer service, the rest were very good and friendly.
